plot_selected.title: Scatter Plot of Band Gap vs Energy Above Hull
plot_selected.description: This plot shows the relationship between band gap and energy above hull for materials.
plot_selected.rationale: Visualizing the stability (energy above hull) against electronic band gap can help identify potential materials that balance stability with insulating properties.

plot_selected.title: Scatter Plot of Density vs Band Gap
plot_selected.description: This plot shows the relationship between density and band gap for materials.
plot_selected.rationale: Understanding the link between density and band gap assists in selecting materials that are both dense enough and have appropriate insulating properties.

plot_selected.title: Scatter Plot of Density vs Energy Above Hull
plot_selected.description: This plot shows the relationship between density and energy above hull for materials.
plot_selected.rationale: This visualization aids in identifying materials that optimize density without compromising stability.

plot_selected.title: Histogram of Band Gap
plot_selected.description: Histogram displaying distribution of band gaps among materials.
plot_selected.rationale: Analyzing the distribution of band gaps helps in assessing the electronic properties of materials.

plot_selected.title: Histogram of Energy Above Hull
plot_selected.description: Histogram displaying distribution of energies above hull among materials.
plot_selected.rationale: This histogram helps in understanding the stability distribution within the materials set.

selection_notes: Selected plots focus on main task criteria: stability, band gap, and density. Three scatter plots provide direct pairwise comparisons aiding selection of materials. Two histograms offer robust distribution insights on properties.
